notes: SHIP v1.14.286 - B-02 FIX: ghost art no longer occludes the BLOCKER hero verb. #pg-cmd .ghosthero was position:absolute;right:8px;bottom:-6px;width:150px, painting OVER the rightmost verb (BLOCKER) in the Active Shift hero - a VISUAL occlusion only (pointer-events:none was already set, so the button stayed tappable, but a gloved tech could not SEE it = Cold Aisle Filter fail). FIX (single selector, hero-cosmetic): constrain width 150->104px, lift base bottom:-6px->84px (clears the ~60px verb row), right 8->6px, z-index:-1 (ambient art BEHIND all hero content so it can never sit over a control and any text-graze reads correctly). Verified against live render: ghost no longer intersects the verb row, headline, or subtext (overlaps:false on all three); verb-row vertical clearance is width-independent (~6px). Redesign-only (#pg-cmd never renders under ?legacy=1 -> byte-identical). No JS, no data path, no state - the rung dim/mid class logic (~L19564) is untouched. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, iPhone @390): SCAN / LOG / BLOCKER all visible in one row; BLOCKER NOT covered by the ghost; tap BLOCKER -> capture opens; ghost reads as ambient background art clear of every control (eyeball the ghost-vs-subtext spacing at 390 - the desktop browser viewport would not force below 1280 for an auto-check). ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Three-stamp .285->.286. Shipped ahead of FIX-2 and Ship 4 (shares the hero card; Ship 4 hero work rebases on this).
